# Yu Li Personal Homepage

This site is the personal homepage of Yu Li, also known as 李钰, 绝顶, carp84, and Apache ID liyu.

Yu Li is EMR Lead at Alibaba Cloud, an ASF Member, and an Apache contributor focused on cloud data platforms, distributed computing, lakehouse architecture, stream processing, state backends, and AI-era data infrastructure.

Key identity links:

- GitHub: https://github.com/carp84
- Apache profile: https://people.apache.org/phonebook.html?uid=liyu
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/carp84
- X: https://twitter.com/LiyuApache
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=oU9DCnoAAAAJ
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4355-2764
- Email: liyu@apache.org

Important pages:

- About: https://carp84.github.io/
- 中文关于: https://carp84.github.io/zh.html
- Open Source: https://carp84.github.io/open-source.html
- 开源: https://carp84.github.io/zh-open-source.html
- Products: https://carp84.github.io/products.html
- 产品: https://carp84.github.io/zh-products.html
- Speaking: https://carp84.github.io/speaking.html
- 演讲: https://carp84.github.io/zh-speaking.html
- Blog: https://carp84.github.io/blog.html
- 博客: https://carp84.github.io/zh-blog.html

Primary Apache projects and roles mentioned on this site include Apache Flink, Apache HBase, Apache Paimon, Apache Celeborn, Apache Gluten, Apache Fluss, Apache Amoro, and Apache GraphAr.

Academic profiles:

- Google Scholar profile: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=oU9DCnoAAAAJ
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4355-2764
- Earlier publications include work on heterogeneous cluster scheduling and web information retrieval, with DOI links on the About page.

Blog posts:

- Published blog posts are listed at https://carp84.github.io/blog.html and https://carp84.github.io/zh-blog.html.
- Draft blog posts are not published on this site.
